findings.title: CISA Flags VMware Aria Operations RCE as Exploited in Attacks
findings.summary: Unauthenticated command injection in VMware Aria Operations added to CISA KEV; affects Cloud Foundation, Telco Cloud, and standalone deployments.

findings.title: Microsoft: Hackers Abuse OAuth Error Flows to Spread Malware
findings.summary: Attackers abuse legitimate OAuth redirection error mechanisms to bypass phishing protections using Microsoft's own infrastructure as a trusted redirect.

findings.title: Android Patches Qualcomm Zero-Day Exploited in Attacks
findings.summary: Google patches 129 Android vulnerabilities including actively exploited Qualcomm display component zero-day used in targeted attacks.

findings.title: Fake IT Support Deploys Havoc C2 — Lateral Movement in 11 Hours
findings.summary: Email spam plus fake IT support calls deploy customized Havoc C2; adversary moved from initial access to 9 endpoints in 11 hours.

noted.summary: Data breach confirmed, hackers leaked stolen files.
Game developer discloses breach affecting user data from January.
Paint manufacturer confirms cyberattack on U.S. site.
Open-source AI security tool adopted by the FortiGate hacker for AI-powered attacks.
